_meta.purpose: Canonical Schedule K-1 (Form 1065) parsed_data — anonymized 21-page Pioneer-style trader fund. Asserts the parser correctly distinguishes Box 10 from Box 20 Code B and preserves multiple same-letter Box 13 AE entries.
_meta.keysExplanation: fields are keyed by IRS box id (A, B, 5, 9a, 10, 12, 21, etc.). codes are keyed by box number whose contents are coded items.

13.notes: Portfolio deductions - Management fees. SUSPENDED under TCJA section 67(g) for individuals through 12/31/2025.
Portfolio deductions - Other deductions. SUSPENDED under TCJA section 67(g) for individuals through 12/31/2025.

20.notes: Investment expenses for Form 4952 line 5. Includes the suspended Box 13 AE amounts (796 + 224).
